pipelines.name: Portrait -> Renaissance
pipelines.description: Transform a portrait into a Renaissance-era oil painting with soft lighting and classical composition

preset.name: [Pipeline] Renaissance - Base Portrait
preset.prompt: masterpiece, best quality, realistic portrait, natural skin texture, dslr, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, professional photography, studio lighting, detailed face
preset.negative_prompt: (worst quality, low quality:1.4), deformed, bad anatomy, bad hands, missing fingers, extra digit, blurry, watermark, anime, cartoon, illustration

preset.name: [Pipeline] Renaissance - Classical Painting
preset.prompt: Renaissance oil painting, old masters style, sfumato technique, soft sfumato lighting, classical composition, warm tones, golden ratio, detailed fabric draping, classical pose, Leonardo da Vinci inspired, museum quality, aged canvas, rich earth tones, chiaroscuro
preset.negative_prompt: (worst quality, low quality:1.4), photorealistic, photograph, modern, digital art, anime, cartoon, neon, bright colors, sharp edges, deformed, blurry, watermark, text
